campaign_id.description: Slug identifying the closed-loop campaign. Must match the slug threaded through submit-flow's spec.
campaign_id.title: Campaign Id

expected_cmd_sha.description: The cmd_sha the about-to-submit run will have, computed via ``compute_cmd_sha(load_tasks_module(.hpc/tasks.py))`` BEFORE invoking submit-flow. The validator checks whether any prior sidecar tagged with the same campaign_id already carries this cmd_sha — if so, the submit would dedupe silently.
expected_cmd_sha.title: Expected Cmd Sha
